name: unmasked
description: Andy Ngo's 'Unmasked: Inside Antifa's Radical Plan to Destroy Democracy' — an investigative account of the Antifa movement, its origins, tactics, and the threat it poses to public order and democratic institutions.
useCase: Understand Antifa's origins, ideology, tactics, the 2020 Portland protests, and the broader threat of far-left political violence.
knownRisks: Controversial topic — Ngo's account is disputed by those who minimize Antifa's threat
Author was personally attacked by Antifa — some may question objectivity
